title: Dubyaea tsarongensis

intro: Dubyaea tsarongensis is a plant species in the family Compositae, native to the high-altitude regions of the Himalayas and Tibetan Plateau. Traditionally, Dubyaea tsarongensis has been used in folk medicine to treat various health conditions, with its health benefits attributed to its anti-inflammatory and antioxidant properties, which are said to aid in relieving digestive issues and reducing the risk of chronic diseases. The bioactive constituents of this plant include sesquiterpene lactones, flavonoids, and phenolic acids, which contribute to its medicinal properties. In traditional Tibetan and Nepalese medicine, Dubyaea tsarongensis is often prepared into herbal teas, decoctions, and infusions, as well as being used as a dried powder for treating various ailments.
